title: Globe Maps
tagline: 3D globe web maps with MapLibre GL
description: Teaches Claude to build interactive 3D globe maps — or convert existing flat Leaflet/Mercator maps to the globe presentation — with MapLibre GL JS. Distilled from building the Train Route Atlas.
teaches: Globe projection setup: projection, atmosphere, and light in a MapLibre v5 style
The gotchas: line densification, [lng, lat] order, style.load vs load, CSP worker/connect-src, vendoring, headless WebGL testing
Data-driven GeoJSON layers: category colors, selection dimming, filters, popups
A Leaflet-to-MapLibre porting table and a self-contained starter page
